warning_text: 보안 경고 / 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request was blocked due to sensitive information.) [tab title: 보안 정책 - 접근 차단]
sender_label: engine page-replacement (WS connect_rpc block path, full page swap + tab title 보안 정책 - 접근 차단)
notes: windows-mcp available and used as primary (GUI). Composer accepted typing immediately (no contenteditable=false issue this time), pasted PII via clipboard; verified full prompt in composer. SUBMIT was the hard part: Enter only no-op'd (no newline/no send), and synthetic JS pointer/mouse/click events on the send button had no effect (kimi guards non-trusted events). Used DevTools console to locate the send control: DIV.send-button-container (cursor:pointer) at CSS ~840,378; the page exposes 0 <button> elements (send is a div+svg). A REAL OS-level Win32 mouse click (SetCursorPos+mouse_event) at the send arrow finally submitted — server first returned a transient 'Server exception, please try again later' toast with prompt unsent. Per instructions did hard-reload retry (2x Ctrl+Shift+R); after reload the WS block path rendered a full page-replacement: tab title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단' and box '보안 경고 / 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' containing '보안 정책'. Warning fully visible end-to-end.
